---
title: " "
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="content-section">

  <h2 class="section-title">Contacto</h2>
  <hr class="section-divider" />

  <p style="color: #7f8c8d; font-size: 0.95rem; max-width: 520px; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
    Estoy abierto/a a colaboraciones, preguntas sobre mi investigación
    o simplemente a conversar sobre temas de interés común. ¡Escríbeme!
  </p>

  <!-- Grid de contacto -->
  <div class="contacto-grid">

    <a href="mailto:tu@correo.edu.mx" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" fill="none"
           viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#3498db" stroke-width="2">
        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
              d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2
                 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2
                 2 0 002 2z"/>
      </svg>
      tu@correo.edu.mx
    </a>

    <a href="https://github.com/tu-usuario" target="_blank" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="#3498db">
        <path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.3 3.438 9.8 8.205 11.385.6.113.82-.258.82-.577
                 0-.285-.01-1.04-.015-2.04-3.338.724-4.042-1.61-4.042-1.61-.546-1.385-1.335-1.755
                 -1.335-1.755-1.087-.744.084-.729.084-.729 1.205.084 1.838 1.236 1.838 1.236
                 1.07 1.835 2.809 1.305 3.495.998.108-.776.417-1.305.76-1.605-2.665-.3-5.466
                 -1.332-5.466-5.93 0-1.31.465-2.38 1.235-3.22-.135-.303-.54-1.523.105-3.176
                 0 0 1.005-.322 3.3 1.23.96-.267 1.98-.399 3-.405 1.02.006 2.04.138 3 .405
                 2.28-1.552 3.285-1.23 3.285-1.23.645 1.653.24 2.873.12 3.176.765.84 1.23
                 1.91 1.23 3.22 0 4.61-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.92.42.36.81 1.096.81 2.22
                 0 1.606-.015 2.896-.015 3.286 0 .315.21.69.825.57C20.565 21.795 24 17.295
                 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12"/>
      </svg>
      github.com/tu-usuario
    </a>

    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/tu-usuario" target="_blank" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="#3498db">
        <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853
                 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9
                 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337
                 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 01-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 112.063 2.065zm1.782
                 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0
                 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24
                 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
      </svg>
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    <a href="https://scholar.google.com" target="_blank" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="#3498db">
        <path d="M12 24a7 7 0 110-14 7 7 0 010 14zm0-24L0 9.5l4.838 3.94A8 8 0 0112 11a8
                 8 0 017.162 2.44L24 9.5z"/>
      </svg>
      Google Scholar
    </a>

    <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000" target="_blank" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="#3498db">
        <path d="M12 0C5.372 0 0 5.372 0 12s5.372 12 12 12 12-5.372
                 12-12S18.628 0 12 0zM7.369 4.378c.525 0 .947.431.947.947s-.422.947-.947.947
                 a.947.947 0 010-1.894zm-.722 3.038h1.444v10.041H6.647V7.416zm3.562
                 0h3.9c3.712 0 5.344 2.653 5.344 5.025 0 2.578-2.016 5.025-5.325
                 5.025h-3.919V7.416zm1.444 1.303v7.444h2.297c3.272 0 3.872-2.862
                 3.872-3.722 0-2.016-1.284-3.722-3.872-3.722h-2.297z"/>
      </svg>
      ORCID
    </a>

    <a href="https://twitter.com/tu-usuario" target="_blank" class="contacto-card">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="#3498db">
        <path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-5.214-6.817L4.99
                 21.75H1.68l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.713 6.231zm-1.161
                 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/>
      </svg>
      @tu-usuario
    </a>

  </div>

  <!-- Nota de respuesta -->
  <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #7f8c8d; margin-top: 2rem;">
    📍 Ubicación: Ciudad, País &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    ⏱ Tiempo de respuesta habitual: 2–3 días hábiles
  </p>

</div>
```
